notes: 2026-06-09 clean bf16 scaling probe on GPU1: FORWARD_DTYPE=bfloat16 makes D256/L12/loop8 batch32 fit at ~67.8GB where fp32 batch32 previously OOMed; stage CE improves (step300=0.9221, step600=0.9751) and h24 loop8 blank_acc rises to 0.3711, h32 to 0.3571, but exact remains 0 and loop gain is only +0.0033 blank_acc. Keep bf16 for scale; next needs more capacity/credit assignment, not feedback sweeps.
